item.name: Yak T'el Caiman
item.description:
This large reptile prowls Bitterbark Cenote in search of its next meal.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: It is believed that this sizable beast uses underground waterways to travel here from the ocean. It seizes its prey in its massive jaws and disappears beneath the surface, never to be seen again.
